creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ben Woods from comment #7)
Thanks for testing, Ben!

Click and drag is not supported. It is a restriction of single-touch gesture processor dated back to 2008 and r183888. Single-double-triple tap and drag only.

It`s possible to add a hack to simulate this but i think it is a wrong way. IMO the right way is to move gesture processing to one of already existing userland library and leave current code path in its current state to vt & sc mouses only.
